data.title: Why ENTRY is the missing compliance layer for Web3: Interview with CEO Rodney Prescott
data.description:
The ever-evolving regulatory and compliance measures are a significant hindrance to the global adoption of blockchain technology. The reason is the anonymity and rigid nature of blockchain infrastructure. ENTRY NETWORK is a solution leveraging zero-knowledge proofs and artificial intelligence to bring compliance on-chain without compromising personal or proprietary information. In this interview, Rodney Prescott, the […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/entry-interview-with-ceo-rodney-prescott/

data.title: Suspected Arrest in Genesis Creditors Theft Case
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, blockchain investigator ZachXBT has disclosed that Danny/Meech, also known as Danish Zulfiqar (Khan), is suspected to have been arrested by law enforcement and had his crypto assets seized. Zulfiqar was allegedly involved in a $243 million theft from Genesis creditors, alongside Malone, Veer, Chen, and Jeandiel. However, Dubai police or UAE regulatory authorities have not made any public statements, nor has any local media reported confirming any villa raids, arrests, or seizures related to Zulfiqar, the Genesis creditors theft case, or the earlier Kroll SIM card swap incident.

data.title: DMG Blockchain Solutions Reports Decrease in Bitcoin Mining Output for November
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, DMG Blockchain Solutions, a publicly listed Bitcoin mining company, has released its operational performance report for November. The report reveals that the company mined 22 BTC in November, a slight decrease from the 23 BTC mined in October. By the end of November, DMG's Bitcoin holdings had increased to 380 BTC, with an overall hash rate of 1.81 EH/s.

data.title: Trump's Policies Intensify Pressure on Future Federal Reserve Leadership
data.description: According to Odaily, U.S. President Donald Trump is escalating tensions for the successor of Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell by advocating policies that could increase inflation. At the same time, he continues to pressure the Federal Reserve to declare victory over rising prices. The mission of the next Federal Reserve Chair is becoming increasingly precarious, with challenges expected regardless of who takes over. Even Trump's long-time advisor, Kevin Hassett, who is currently seen as the frontrunner, would face extreme pressure if appointed. The path to interest rate cuts in the short term is likely to become more difficult, potentially leading to dissatisfaction from Trump.
